Class TaskProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration.TaskProperties
@ConfigurationProperties(prefix="spring.cloud.task") public class TaskProperties extends Object
Properties available to configure the task.
Author:
Glenn Renfro, David Turanski

    DEFAULT_TABLE_PREFIX
